narrative_beat: Close extremo tela de computador com dados de apostas em cascata e reflexo de olho humano

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: an extreme close-up of a computer monitor screen showing cascading lines of green-gold betting data streaming downward like a matrix, with the faint reflection of a human eye visible on the glass surface
subject.focal_point: the reflected human eye visible through the data cascade
subject.secondary: Data lines in green-gold on black screen.
props: computer monitor with cascading betting data
reflected human eye on screen glass

composition.foreground: green-gold data streams in vivid warm tones on black screen

lighting.key_light: green-gold monitor glow as sole light
lighting.rim_light: faint data-colored reflection on eye surface

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: surveillance, the watcher becomes the watched

symbolism.primary: thousands of bets per second — AI sees everything
symbolism.secondary: human eye reduced to passive observer of its own exploitation

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
